channel.title: R on Mathatistics
channel.description: Recent content in R on Mathatistics

item.title: Using Data from different Packages
item.description: Most of the time we need data either for teaching purpose or learning things. Whatever be the reason, data are really important things. R and different packages of R contains different datasets which we can use directly just by installing them. Many books related to R illustrate there examples using these data sources. We can find the dataset from differnt sources as data() The datasets from the package datasets and other loaded packages is shown in default.
